review_title: Easy to use, user friendly and very smooth applications
author: James T.
pros: Mobile & Desktop Friendly, allows easy access even out of office. The features also allow tracking and checking of other colleagues in/out office for operational communications/coordinations.
cons: None at this point, keep up the good work guys. Look forward to more user friendly improvements and enhancements.

author: Liza R.
pros: It’s quite easy to use and navigate. There is an app.
cons: To combine all the modules to just 1 app as oppose to using 2 to 3 different apps. Additionally, perhaps JustLogin needs to think about adding a booking of roster function. This is an up and coming trend since we are living in a “gig” era. As a company that provides HR services to its clients, this feature will value add to our daily administrative tasks.

review_title: It is good but it should get better and better!
author: Rosalind H.
pros: Ease of use by staff in leave application and viewing their pay, wherever and whenever.
cons: Payroll needs to accommodate more features : 1. The bank GIRO amount for staff salary can be adjusted without affecting the calculation for CPF. E.g. a staff might be paid a net salary of $1000 but only wants $800 to be in GIRO and $200 paid in cash. Currently this cannot be done as we have to input $1000 for GIRO otherwise the CPF will not be calculated on $1000 but $800. This is inflexible. 2. The other issue is that we have to manually submit the Voluntary CPF contributions as there is no digital provision in JustLogin. Understand this has been a request for at least the last few months from various clients. Yet it has not been addressed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ranjini S.
pros: Easy to use, relevant to SG regulations
cons: There is no prompt. Eg MBMF was not paid for staff since Nov last year as the field had an expiry date that was made during the inception of Justlogin set up for our company. Some of the support service staff is not helpful sometimes, the answers are very vague.

review_title: Ease of use and efficient HR management software
author: Siti S.
pros: The platform is easy to use and implemented in the company. The support system is also vibrant to assist with any issues or else there is always an easy access FAQ with detailed information
cons: For my expenses claims module, it would be great if the payout could be more seamless to allow separate payout rather than to be added to the main payroll platform. This is just not convenient for us as we process reimbursement on a weekly basis. It would be good also if we can add on more than one super admin for backup.

review_title: Pros and Cons of Using JustLogin
author: Zahara A.
pros: Features are user-friendly and easy to use
cons: The payroll system lacks the basic reports necessary to do checking such as YTD report for each employee. The time attendance can be erratic. Sometimes a staff clocks in and the system did not capture it successfully.

author: Cherie L.
pros: Easy to use for both administrator and users
cons: No performance review module available. To get from recommended partner vendor (but limited integration - still need to log into two systems)

author: Gemma C.
pros: The online leave application enabled us to save processing time and provide real-time information.
cons: I cannot think of a disadvantage at the moment.

author: James S.
pros: Ease of use, user friendly feature. Online feature.
cons: Need to use a laptop/pc to do login. Need to carry system around.

description: A one-stop payroll + leave module makes payroll processing a breeze, especially with the great resignation. Has been a positive experience so far.
author: Wl L.
pros: Monthly payrun doesn't take up much time as long as information in system is accurate. Directs you straight to CPF website for CPF submission. System automatically calculates prorated salary etc based on new joiner / leaver dates.
cons: I find myself always trying to make sense of the different e-leave reports / formats. Doesn't feel very straight forward. Takes a couple of trial-and-error before I find what I need. Leave application is a breeze. However, would be great if leave cancellation can be a feature on app as well. It's currently only available on web.

review_title: Review for a user of Just Login for close to 10 years
description: I have a small team and this software help me to be more efficient and at the same time, provide visibility to my team member, the claim are trackable and Leave system can be process in an efficient manner too.
author: Chong Kiang D.
pros: It is Web based and there is mobile app available too, I can easily access the system and process, what I need to, anywhere I am.
cons: It took, some getting used to, especially, when they changed to the new interface but once you get the hang of it, it is easy.

description: The payroll system reduces the time spent and errors make.
author: Lixia L.
pros: The CPF contribution report and payroll for bulk banking report make it very convenient for submission.
cons: The font is very tiny. System at times were slow, have to double check to ensure input is updated. You may want to have a report where HR can select the fields of staff particulars.

description: The leave module was quite painful as it is relatively inflexible.
author: Cheng Yong N.
pros: We automate quite a bit of processes especially payroll. The expense management was also one of the main reasons why we used it.
cons: The leave module is inflexible and i want an option of claiming expenses without depending on the OCR.

review_title: An easy to implement and use HR software
description: Justlogin has a very professional team to support you in the implementation and set up phase. Subsequently, they also provide excellent technical support. Overall, Justlogin has saved us significant time and resource in HR and payroll management!
author: Wilson L.
pros: Justlogin is fairly intuitive and easy to use. The support team is also quick to assist you with any queries or issues, and they are continuously striving to upgrade and improve both the product and customer service/technical support service.
cons: Setting up for multiple shifts with time attendance tracking can be very complex to do. Time attendance tracking can be improved for hourly paid staff and for tracking OT hours. A large F&B business for example with a large percentage of part time/hourly paid staff may struggle to use or set up Justlogin.

description: Overall good experience, just a bit of limitation
author: Set Ping B.
pros: Ease of adoption of software by staff. Ease of set up with great support & help from JustLogin team. Helpdesk support is superb.
cons: No voluntary CPF submission by Justlogin which we have to do manually on CPF website. More options to customize the way we want our leave details to be shared within the company. Unable to accede to more complex leave policies. Unable to indicate as both cash and bank payment for staff
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: We use it for your own and we recommend it to our clients.
author: Darren K.
pros: Its very functional. The company progressively improves its technology and functions and that gives me a lot of assurance.
cons: Some parts of the system still looks old school. Need to improve the user graphical and layout experience I believe.

review_title: Value for money, easy to use, Support are there to help!
author: Kimmy C.
pros: Easy to use, can customize to your need. There are support there to help if you encounter problem. Overall, will recommend if you need some software to start off.
cons: some features are not linked up. leave application show too detail but on a general overview of leave for all staffs.

author: Nur Ily Alyea A.
pros: The features are easy to navigate and quite straight forward.
cons: For the leave module - it is not as flexible in terms of ad-hoc leave application

author: margaret S.
pros: Payroll module covers most of the essentials which ease my workload tremendously.
cons: Leave - unable to stitch the reports for all my staff across countries, e.g. HK & MY Expense - OCR still not functioning. Only selected models can work

description: Justlogin has shown itself a company that is very responsive to users' needs and feedback. Plus they're always innovating to solidify its relevance.
author: John T.
pros: Features are easy to use. Even when you are unsure, there's good support.
cons: Perhaps - in the latest version - may consider making font types clearer to see

review_title: Overall a good system to use for time attendance, eleave and payroll automation
description: So far the support and the system has been very pleasant.
author: Sandie N.
pros: Ease to use, simple. Easy to follow instructions, prompt customer service support.
cons: So far, the software has no issues; except that not very sure where to obtain certain reports

description: Just simply fine, not the best in the market.
author: Stephanie Y.
pros: Pretty easy to use, no other comments as it is short and simple.
cons: There are some inflexibilities. Users can't make amendments of many fields. Price is not cheap, no package pricing, e.g. 2 modules just add a small price.

review_title: easy effective leave application & tracking tools
author: nur farzana S.
pros: It meets my needs as i directly applied my leave in the system which notify my supervisor for recommendation & then its notify) my manager for leave approval.(through outlook mail) -my summary of leave taken & balance are all track accordingly. - its accessible with internet connection , i normally access from mobile window browser without any issue.
cons: The layout might seems a bit old school, but its meet the purpose. Maybe it can be customized/design better.

description: As a new user, though online training was given, I find that the trainer rushed through the process and did not give time to participants to digest or fully understand what was relayed.
author: Robyn T.
pros: For a small organisation, it does serves our needs though the reporting feature could be enhanced further.
cons: Some process steps could be fine tuned to cut down the no of steps for users (can be made transparent and done backend).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Justlogin for Best Customer Experience & Support
description: Justlogin not only brought convenience, ease of use through their mobile application to our colleagues but also to the administrators through their integrated HR Cloud System where we can access the features anytime, anywhere. Through our partnership over the past few years, the Justlogin Team remained open to suggestions and is constantly evolving to improve their customer experience. We would definitely recommend Justlogin to anyone considering an integrated HR Cloud System.
author: Rebecca C.
pros: JustLogin is an integrated Cloud HR System with Mobile Application services for their Payroll, Leave, Attendance, People Data Management. The Attendance module allows staff who worked off site to clock in and out wherever they are, the data is then captured with their GPS location into cloud. Staffs can now apply their leaves and check their payslip via the mobile application or through the JustLogin portal. Justlogin not only brought convenience but also, ease of use to both Furuno employees and administrators. Administrators can now work on payrolls anytime, anywhere. Aside from conducting regular trainings and value added talks for business owners and HR professionals, the best part is that the support team is open to our suggestions and ideas to implement new improvements for the system so we can be sure JustLogin is constantly improvement.
cons: There were occasional issues with the timeclock where employees would clock in but there are delays or no entry in capturing the data in the website, hence we have to manually adjust the timeclock. The reports can be improved to be more comprehensive. Some of the reports which used to be available in the original system is missing in the new Express module. It will be advantageous to provide HR analytics information and reporting for HR insights.
